nasa_apod.title: The Path of Artemis II
nasa_apod.explanation: Why doesn't Artemis II land on the Moon? The main reason is that Artemis II is primarily a test mission designed to make a future Artemis missions -- which will land humans on the Moon -- better prepared.  Similarly, NASA's Apollo 8 and Apollo 10 went right near the Moon as tests before Apollo 11 --...
